title: Johnson Controls (JCI)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Johnson Controls using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what JCI is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-77xufajv>
FCF in FY2025 was abnormally low ($965M) compared to historical norms (e.g., $1.78B in FY2023). We model an 8% growth rate as a modest recovery trajectory, capturing ongoing benefits from the OpenBlue platform and smart building investments.
